title: location columns data was left now centre, how do i change it back?
excerpt:
Up until a week or so ago, the data in my locations columns was showing and entered from left and is now displaying and entered in the centre of the column centre 
I assume there has been a new release with is feature, h…

posts.author: YPDJames (James)
posts.cookedHtml:
Up until a week or so ago, the data in my locations columns was showing and entered from left and is now displaying and entered in the centre of the column centre

I assume there has been a new release with is feature, how can i change it back?

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @YPDJames

This isn’t a setting you can change. Monday currently doesn’t support custom text alignment in columns, so content is auto-centered. If this looks different from before, it’s likely part of a recent UI update rather than a new toggle being turned on.

You can switch column types, but alignment itself can’t be adjusted yet. The best option is to upvote the existing feature request so the product team can prioritize it.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @YPDJames,

From what I’ve seen, this is expected behavior. When using the Address column, shorter values tend to appear centered, while longer addresses align from the left. Once you adjust or expand the column width, the text recenters itself.

If you’re seeing something different on your end, I’d recommend opening a ticket with monday.com support so they can take a closer look at your setup.
